package rulecoverage

func PositiveRouterConstructorBuildsConcreteDependencies() string {
    ruleID := "router_constructor_builds_concrete_dependencies"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Router setup that creates DB clients, external clients, or repositories directly instead of receiving prebuilt dependencies."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
